**What happened?**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**What did you expect to happen?**

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Repository loaded: <!-- e.g. sjyq.oozvia or the name you searched -->
2. Filters applied: <!-- e.g. type=Dataset, Min. updates=3, Re-curated only checked -->
3. Action taken: <!-- e.g. clicked history on a DOI, applied a filter -->
4. What happened: <!-- e.g. no records returned, page went blank, error message -->

**URL when the bug occurred**
<!-- Paste the full URL from your browser — this captures all filter/sort state -->

**Browser and device**
<!-- e.g. Chrome 124 on Mac, Safari on iPhone -->

**Screenshots**
<!-- If applicable, drag and drop a screenshot here -->
